title: The not like returned unexpected results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(col1 String, col2 Nullable(Int32), col3 Date);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE col1 NOT LIKE 'test' OR col2 IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE col1 NOT LIKE concat('%', col1, '%');
key_bug_features: not like operator returning unexpected results
